name: 5 Star Car Title Loans
description_short: Auto title lender operating since 2012, offering $100–$50,000 loans secured by vehicle equity with same-day funding and no prepayment penalties across ~18 states.
description_long:
5 Star Car Title Loans™ is a licensed auto title lending company headquartered in San Bernardino, California. Founded in 2012, the company reports having funded over 255,000 loans and operates physical locations across approximately 18 states, including California, Florida, Texas, Michigan, Tennessee, and others. It positions itself as a fast-access lender for consumers who need cash quickly and may not qualify for traditional credit products.

The company offers three core products: vehicle title loans (secured by the borrower's car, motorcycle, or commercial vehicle title), installment loans with fixed monthly payments over up to 24 months, and same-day loans for urgent cash needs. Loan amounts range from $100 to $50,000, with the upper end determined by the vehicle's equity value. Borrowers retain use of their vehicle throughout the loan term. Applications can be completed online or in person, with approval decisions described as taking minutes.

What distinguishes 5 Star Car Title Loans from traditional lenders is its explicit acceptance of applicants with poor or no credit history — the vehicle title serves as collateral in lieu of creditworthiness. The company accepts a variety of vehicle types as collateral, including motorcycles and semi-trucks, which broadens eligibility. It also advertises no prepayment penalties, transparent terms, and no hidden fees. The website uses 256-bit SSL and TLS encryption for application security.

Honestly assessed, 5 Star Car Title Loans is a high-cost emergency lender. The website does not disclose APR ranges anywhere in its content — a significant omission that prevents borrowers from making an informed comparison. Title loans as a product category typically carry triple-digit APRs and carry the risk of vehicle repossession if payments are missed. The 4.7-star rating is based on only 11 reviews despite 255K+ claimed loans, which limits its reliability as a signal of quality. This product is best treated as a last resort for borrowers with no other options.
pros: Licensed and regulated lender operating since 2012 with 255K+ loans funded
Borrowers keep their vehicle throughout the loan repayment period
Same-day funding available for approved applicants
No prepayment penalties — pay off early without fees
Accepts alternative vehicle types as collateral, including motorcycles and semi-trucks
Online and in-person application options available
Operates in approximately 18 states with physical branch locations
cons: APR and interest rate ranges are not disclosed anywhere on the website — a major transparency gap
Title loans carry risk of vehicle repossession if the borrower defaults
Only 11 public reviews despite claiming over 255,000 loans funded — rating is statistically thin
Product is unavailable in most US states; coverage limited to ~18 states
No information on loan fees, origination charges, or total cost of borrowing
best_for: Vehicle owners with poor or no credit history who need emergency cash quickly
Borrowers who need larger emergency amounts ($5,000–$50,000) and have vehicle equity
Consumers in one of the ~18 served states who need same-day funding
People who need to retain use of their vehicle while accessing its equity
diagnosis: Best suited for vehicle owners with damaged credit who need fast access to cash and have exhausted lower-cost options such as credit union PALs, personal loans, or family assistance. The primary caveat is that title loans are among the most expensive consumer credit products available — APRs are not disclosed on the site — and defaulting puts the borrower's vehicle at risk of repossession.
services: Car title loans (secured by vehicle equity)
Semi-truck and commercial vehicle title loans
Cash loans with no credit check requirement
